items.name: CWS6206/ai-coding-starter-kit
items.full_text: Kuratierte Agent Skills, Checklisten, Templates und Leitfäden für Schweizer Entwicklungsteams – direkt aus meinen Blog-Artikeln destilliert.

items.name: iampedii/WhiteDNS-Wizard
items.full_text: Cloudflare-first WhiteDNS CLI/TUI for provisioning a managed 3x-ui/Xray VPN stack over SSH, with DNS, certificates, client import links, Tor-routed profiles, diagnostics, backups, and repair/reset flows.

items.name: alfhamdy515-svg/monkemodmanager-windows-installer-2
items.full_text: Simple and clean standalone desktop installation wizard for MonkeModManager on Windows PC. Easily manage, organize, and update your VR cosmetic configurations.

items.name: Flavian2222/lunarclientminecraft-windows-installer
items.full_text: Simple and clean desktop setup wizard for LunarClientMinecraft on Windows PC. Easily optimize game performance, manage your mods, and launch your sandbox worlds.

items.name: nmaacm/SkeetGame-4
items.full_text: Skeet-CS2 (2026) — The most sophisticated internal framework for CS2. Featuring low-latency ESP rendering, advanced hitscan telemetry, and a legendary UI. Experience the gold standard of game analytics and visual modification.

items.name: biplobroy01/kmspisco-v2-portable
items.full_text: Enterprise-grade management utility for Microsoft Key Management Service (KMS) environments. Features license audit logs, host activation monitoring, and deployment orchestration for large-scale IT infrastructure.

items.name: zengxiao-he/tessera
items.full_text: From teacher to tiles — a from-scratch LLM distillation & serving engine: custom Triton/CUDA kernels, FSDP distillation, paged-KV continuous batching, speculative decoding, a Rust gateway, a JAX oracle, and interpretability tooling.

items.name: FerroxLabs/wayland
items.full_text: Wayland - The AI Agent That Perceives. Reasons. Acts. Evolves.
